overview.description: The T-Rex 2X Long HOOD Daily Target ETF (ROBN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Robinhood Markets Inc. stock, less fees, and expenses. ROBN was launched on Jan 31, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.
